info.title: Saluna API
info.description: Tenant-facing Saluna API. Generated from Hono OpenAPI route definitions. This contract is expanded incrementally; admin, Support Tickets, clients, staff, services catalog, appointments, appointment-requests, settings, salon-profile, salon-public-settings, onboarding, dashboard, today, retention, messaging, notifications, notification-preferences, and public booking route groups are documented.

tags.name: Staff
tags.description: Staff roster, schedules, and service assignments

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Salon business hours and slot duration

tags.name: Salon public settings
tags.description: Public booking page settings and slug

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: Manager onboarding wizard status and step actions

tags.name: Messaging
tags.description: Messaging provider account linking (Telegram, Bale, etc.)

tags.name: Public booking
tags.description: Unauthenticated public salon page and appointment request flows

tags.name: Admin support tickets
tags.description: Internal platform Support Ticket inbox and operations

id.description: Optional client-provided UUID for offline-first sync

reason.description: Follow-up reason; unknown values default to manual server-side

schedule.description: Weekly schedule rows (one per day of week)

id.description: Optional client-provided UUID for offline-first sync

staffId.description: Staff member assigned when converting the request to an appointment

reason.description: Optional rejection reason shown to salon staff

closureNote.description: Optional note explaining the customer withdrawal

get.description: Returns all non-placeholder clients for the authenticated salon tenant.

409.description: Phone number already registered for this salon

example.error: این شماره تماس برای این سالن قبلاً ثبت شده است

post.description: Creates up to 200 clients in one request. Partial success is allowed; duplicates and invalid rows are returned in skipped.

409.description: Phone number already registered for this salon

example.error: این شماره تماس برای این سالن قبلاً ثبت شده است

200.description: Client profile summary with appointments and follow-ups

get.description: Returns all active staff and managers for the authenticated salon tenant.

post.description: Creates a salon-owned Staff Profile and a pending Staff Invite from name and phone only. Pending invites grant no login access.

200.description: Created Staff Profile with pending Staff Invite

409.description: Staff Invite conflict for this phone in the salon (pending invite, inactive profile, or duplicate active profile)

example.error: برای این شماره قبلاً دعوت در انتظار وجود دارد

get.summary: Staff booking availability for a slot

200.description: Per-staff availability for the requested slot

409.description: Phone number already registered

example.error: این شماره موبایل قبلاً ثبت شده است

200.description: Weekly schedule and salon business hours

post.description: Revokes the pending Staff Invite for a Staff Profile. Keeps the salon-owned Staff Profile.

404.description: Pending Staff Invite not found for this Staff Profile

409.description: Staff Invite is not pending, or the Staff Profile is inactive

example.error: این دعوت دیگر در انتظار نیست

post.description: Issues a new invite token and refreshes expiry/delivery metadata for a pending Staff Invite. Does not create another Staff Profile.

404.description: Pending Staff Invite not found for this Staff Profile

409.description: Staff Invite is not pending, or the Staff Profile is inactive

example.error: این دعوت دیگر در انتظار نیست

404.description: Appointment request not found or no longer pending

get.description: Salon working hours and slot duration. Readable by any tenant member.

200.description: Business settings for the authenticated salon

get.description: Address, maps, social links, and website shown on the public page.

200.description: Public page settings, slug, and service visibility
Updated slug and refreshed public page settings

409.description: Slug already taken by another salon

get.description: Salon setup progress for the manager onboarding wizard. Step flags are derived from salon data.

200.description: Current onboarding status for the authenticated salon

patch.description: Apply a wizard action such as confirming business hours, marking the manager as solo staff, completing, skipping, or reopening onboarding.

get.description: Aggregated counts, revenue, and breakdowns for the manager dashboard.

200.description: Dashboard metrics for the authenticated salon

get.description: Appointments, attention items, staff load, and open slots for a calendar day. Staff members only see their own appointments.

schema.description: Calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to salon local today.

parameters.description: Calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to salon local today.
parameters.name: date

200.description: Today view payload for the requested date

403.description: Authenticated but not a salon member

get.description: Open client follow-ups derived from appointment history. Does not send messages automatically.

200.description: Retention queue items for the authenticated salon

post.description: Sends a one-off follow-up message via Bale Safir for an open retention item.

409.description: Follow-up not open, message already sent, or retry required

get.description: Returns configured messaging providers and the authenticated user linked accounts.

post.description: Creates a short-lived deep link token for linking a messaging provider account.

201.description: Deep link for the selected provider

400.description: Messaging provider is not configured or available

patch.summary: Enable or disable a linked messaging account

post.description: Development-only route. Returns 404 when ENABLE_NOTIFICATION_TEST is not set or in production.

200.description: Notification preferences for the authenticated user

get.description: Unauthenticated salon profile, public page settings, and visible services for the booking site.

404.description: Salon, service, or appointment request not found

get.description: Returns unioned free slots across staff qualified for the service. Customers do not pick staff in v1.

403.description: Public booking is disabled for this salon

404.description: Salon, service, or appointment request not found

201.description: Request created; token authorizes status lookup and cancel

404.description: Salon, service, or appointment request not found

429.description: Too many public booking submissions from this IP

get.description: Token-authorized status view. Customer identity fields are intentionally omitted.

200.description: Appointment request status for the customer

404.description: Salon, service, or appointment request not found

post.summary: Cancel a pending public appointment request

404.description: Salon, service, or appointment request not found

409.description: Appointment request cannot be cancelled in its current state
